svg.title: Admin completion phase — after candidate visits lab
svg.desc: Final steps: candidate visits lab, lab marks visited, lab uploads report, admin marks fit or unfit, fitness certificate generated, company invoiced, lab paid, admin keeps margin.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a candidate visits the lab?')
sendPrompt('How does the lab upload test reports into the system?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin review before marking fit or unfit?')
sendPrompt('What does a fitness certificate contain?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a candidate is marked unfit?')
sendPrompt('How does the financial settlement work between admin, company, and lab?')
g.text: Company invoiced · lab paid · admin keeps margin
